description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-10 Docker image, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS="--batch-mode --errors --fail-at-end --show-version -DinstallAtEnd=true -DdeployAtEnd=true" and MAVEN_OPTS="-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.log.org.apache.maven.cli.transfer.Slf4jMavenTransferListener=WARN -Dorg.slf4j.simpleLogger.showDateTime=true -Djava.awt.headless=true". Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a validate:jdk10 job that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile" and also provide a hidden .validate template with the same script and stage. In the test stage add a unit-test job that runs only on the master branch, uses the same image, executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test", and uploads the target/staging directory as an artifact, and also provide a hidden .verify template that runs on all branches except master and executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage".
